og.title: Converting PDF to Web App with Claude Code & NYS Design System | Jesse Gardner posted on the topic | LinkedIn
og.description:
Watch me turn a PDF into a web application in 10 minutes using Claude Code and the NYS Design System MCP server.

I posted about this experiment a few weeks ago, but a few people asked how it actually worked. So I recorded the process start-to-finish.

Some highlights from the video:

- The prompt I’m using (a PRD + tasks approach)
- How the Figma MCP server differs from our custom NYS Design System MCP server
- The MCP tools we built, and what structured information they pass to the model
- Exp
